title: ceanothus herbaceus var. pubescens
intro: Ceanothus herbaceus var. pubescens, also known as pubescent New Jersey tea, is a variety of shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, making it beneficial for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ceanothus herbaceus var. pubescens include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
